tasks.title: Alert Trigger Engine
tasks.description: Build the core alert evaluation engine that checks exposure data against configurable thresholds on each WebSocket update cycle. Support trigger types: exposure threshold, hedge ratio, P&L limit, account-level exposure. Store thresholds in risk_thresholds Supabase table. Engine should be extensible for future trigger types.
subtasks: Create AlertEngine service in CoverageManager.Core
Define RiskThreshold model (symbol, trigger_type, operator, value, enabled)
Load thresholds from Supabase on startup + periodic refresh
Evaluate thresholds against live ExposureSummary on each update
Create AlertEvent model (id, trigger_type, symbol, threshold, actual_value, timestamp, acknowledged)
Store fired alerts in Supabase alert_events table
Expose GET /api/alerts (active alerts) and POST /api/alerts/{id}/acknowledge

tasks.title: Risk Thresholds Management UI
tasks.description: Build a settings panel in the React dashboard for managing risk thresholds. CRUD operations for thresholds per symbol with trigger type, operator, and value. Uses the risk_thresholds Supabase table.
subtasks: Create ThresholdsController with CRUD endpoints
Build RiskThresholds settings page in React
Table view: symbol, trigger type, operator, value, enabled toggle
Add/edit modal for threshold configuration
Delete with confirmation
Real-time validation (no duplicate triggers per symbol)

tasks.title: In-App Alert Notifications
tasks.description: Display fired alerts as toast notifications and a persistent alert banner in the dashboard. Include sound alerts. Alerts should be dismissible/acknowledgeable. Show alert count badge on the nav bar.
subtasks: Push alerts via WebSocket to connected clients
Build AlertToast component (auto-dismiss after X seconds)
Build AlertBanner component (persistent until acknowledged)
Add alert sound (configurable on/off in settings)
Alert count badge on nav bar
Alert history panel (list of past alerts with timestamps)

tasks.title: Economic Calendar Integration
tasks.description: Fetch economic events from an external source and display them in the dashboard. Alert before high-impact events (NFP, FOMC, etc.). Store events in economic_events Supabase table.
subtasks: Research and select economic calendar API source
Build EconomicCalendarService to fetch and cache events
Store events in Supabase economic_events table
Create EconomicCalendar component in dashboard
Add pre-event alert trigger type to AlertEngine
Show impact indicators on exposure table (icon near affected symbols)

tasks.title: Notification Channels — Email, Slack, Telegram
tasks.description: Build pluggable notification channel system. Each user configures which channels they want per alert type. Support Email, Slack webhook, and Telegram bot. Store channel config in Supabase.
subtasks: Create INotificationChannel interface
Implement EmailChannel (SMTP or SendGrid)
Implement SlackChannel (webhook URL)
Implement TelegramChannel (bot API)
User notification preferences UI in Settings
NotificationDispatcher that routes alerts to user-configured channels
Store notification_preferences in Supabase

tasks.title: Hedge Execution — Order Sending
tasks.description: Implement one-click hedge execution via the Python collector's mt5.order_send(). Dealer clicks 'To Cover' on a symbol, system pre-fills the order, and sends to LP account after confirmation.
subtasks: Add POST /execute endpoint to Python collector (mt5.order_send)
Create HedgeExecutionController in C# backend (proxy to collector)
Build HedgeDialog component — pre-filled volume, LP account, confirm/cancel
Add 'Hedge' button to To Cover column in ExposureTable
Support partial hedging (percentage slider or manual volume)
Handle execution errors and display fill report

tasks.title: Hedge Configuration & LP Account Management
tasks.description: Allow dealers to configure hedge execution settings: LP account selection, confirmation toggle, default hedge percentage. Support multiple LP accounts per broker.
subtasks: LP account management UI (add/edit/remove LP connections)
Default hedge settings per symbol (auto-fill %, confirmation required)
LP account health check (connection status, margin available)
Store hedge_settings in Supabase

tasks.title: Hedge Audit Trail
tasks.description: Log every hedge execution with full details: who, when, what symbol, volume, price, fill status, slippage. Store in hedge_executions Supabase table. Display in a dedicated audit view.
subtasks: Populate hedge_executions table on each execution
Build HedgeAuditLog component (filterable by symbol, date, status)
Calculate and display slippage (requested vs filled price)
Export hedge audit to CSV

tasks.title: Pre-Trade Validation
tasks.description: Before executing a hedge, validate: sufficient margin on LP account, symbol available for trading, market is open, volume within limits. Block execution with clear error if validation fails.
subtasks: Check LP account margin before sending order
Verify symbol is tradeable on LP terminal
Check market hours (session open/closed)
Validate volume against min/max lot sizes
Display validation errors in HedgeDialog before submit

tasks.title: Daily P&L Summary Report
tasks.description: Generate daily P&L report broken down by symbol, account, and desk. Support date range selection. Query Supabase deals table with aggregation.
subtasks: Create ReportsController with GET /api/reports/pnl-summary
Aggregate P&L by symbol, by account, by day from Supabase
Build DailyPnLReport page in React
Date range picker, grouping toggles (symbol/account/day)
Totals row and running totals

tasks.title: Trade History Export
tasks.description: Export trade/deal history to CSV, Excel, and PDF formats. Support filtering by date range, symbol, account, source.
subtasks: Add export endpoints: GET /api/reports/export?format=csv|xlsx|pdf
CSV generation (server-side)
Excel generation (EPPlus or ClosedXML library)
PDF generation (QuestPDF or similar)
Download button in trade history views
Filter parameters (date, symbol, account, source)

tasks.title: Hedge Effectiveness Report
tasks.description: Report showing how well coverage matched client exposure over time. Hedge ratio history, coverage gaps, slippage analysis. Time-series chart of hedge ratio per symbol.
subtasks: Store periodic hedge ratio snapshots (from exposure_snapshots)
Build HedgeEffectivenessReport page
Time-series chart: hedge ratio per symbol over time
Coverage gap analysis (periods where hedge < threshold)
Slippage summary from hedge_executions

tasks.title: Account Activity Report
tasks.description: Per-client trading summary report: trade count, volume, P&L, win rate, most traded symbols, equity curve. Reuse AccountModal data in a full report page.
subtasks: GET /api/reports/account-activity?login=&from=&to=
Build AccountActivityReport page
Metrics: trade count, volume, P&L, win rate, avg hold time
Most traded symbols breakdown
Equity curve chart (reuse from AccountModal)

tasks.title: Custom Report Builder
tasks.description: User-defined report builder: select data source, filters, columns, grouping, sorting. Save report templates. Schedule delivery via email.
subtasks: Report builder UI — drag-and-drop columns, filter rows
Data source selection (deals, positions, exposure, accounts)
Save/load report templates to Supabase
Schedule report delivery (cron + email)
Export in all formats (CSV, Excel, PDF)

tasks.title: Tenant Isolation & Multi-Tenancy
tasks.description: Implement tenant isolation so each broker has their own data, configuration, and branding. Row-level security in Supabase. Tenant context in all API requests.
subtasks: Add tenant_id column to all Supabase tables
Implement Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) policies
Tenant context middleware in C# backend
Tenant-aware queries in all services
Tenant configuration table (name, branding, settings)

tasks.title: User Authentication & Role Management
tasks.description: Implement user login, registration, and role-based access control. Roles: admin, dealer, viewer. Supabase Auth or custom JWT. Protect all API endpoints.
subtasks: Setup Supabase Auth (or custom JWT auth)
Login/register pages in React
Role model: admin (full access), dealer (trade + view), viewer (read-only)
Auth middleware in C# backend (validate JWT, extract tenant + role)
Protect all API endpoints with role checks
User management UI for admins (invite, edit roles, disable)

tasks.title: White-Label & Branding
tasks.description: Allow each tenant to customize branding: logo, colors, app name. Applied via tenant config on login. Store assets in Supabase Storage.
subtasks: Tenant branding config (logo_url, primary_color, app_name)
Apply branding dynamically in React (ThemeContext extension)
Logo upload to Supabase Storage
Branding settings UI for tenant admins
Custom login page per tenant

tasks.title: Broker Onboarding Flow
tasks.description: Self-service onboarding: broker signs up, configures MT5 credentials, sets up symbol mappings, invites team members. Guided wizard UI.
subtasks: Onboarding wizard component (multi-step form)
Step 1: Broker info (name, contact)
Step 2: MT5 Manager credentials (B-Book server)
Step 3: Coverage account setup
Step 4: Symbol mapping configuration
Step 5: Invite team members
Connection test at each MT5 step

tasks.title: Multi-Server MT5 Support
tasks.description: Support connecting to multiple MT5 servers simultaneously. Each broker can have multiple B-Book servers and multiple coverage accounts. Dynamic connection management.
subtasks: Refactor MT5ManagerConnection to support multiple instances
Refactor Python collector to handle multiple coverage accounts
Connection pool manager (start/stop/health per connection)
Aggregate exposure across multiple servers
Server management UI (add/edit/remove MT5 connections)

tasks.title: Public REST API for Brokers
tasks.description: Expose a documented REST API that brokers can use to integrate programmatically. API key authentication. Rate limiting. OpenAPI/Swagger docs.
subtasks: API key generation and management (per tenant)
API key auth middleware
Rate limiting per API key
Public endpoints: exposure, positions, deals, accounts, alerts
OpenAPI/Swagger documentation
API usage dashboard (calls, errors, rate limit hits)

tasks.title: Webhook Event System
tasks.description: Allow brokers to register webhook URLs for real-time event notifications: alert fired, deal closed, hedge executed, threshold breached. Retry logic for failed deliveries.
subtasks: Webhook registration API (URL, events, secret)
WebhookDispatcher service
Event types: alert_fired, deal_closed, hedge_executed, threshold_breached
HMAC signature for webhook payloads
Retry logic with exponential backoff
Webhook delivery log

tasks.title: Docker & Cloud Deployment
tasks.description: Containerize all services (C# backend, Python collector, React frontend) with Docker. Create docker-compose for local dev. Prepare for cloud deployment.
subtasks: Dockerfile for C# backend
Dockerfile for Python collector
Dockerfile for React frontend (nginx)
docker-compose.yml for local development
Environment variable configuration for all services
CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions: build, test, deploy)

tasks.title: Mobile-Responsive Dashboard
tasks.description: Make the React dashboard responsive for tablet and mobile. Priority: exposure table, P&L panel, alerts. Not a separate app — responsive CSS.
subtasks: Responsive breakpoints (mobile < 768px, tablet 768-1024px)
ExposureTable: horizontal scroll or card layout on mobile
PnLPanel: stack cards vertically on mobile
Navigation: hamburger menu on mobile
Compare tab: stack left/right panels vertically on mobile
Touch-friendly controls (larger tap targets, swipe gestures)

tasks.title: Health Monitoring & Uptime
tasks.description: System health dashboard: MT5 connection status, collector health, WebSocket clients, Supabase connection, memory/CPU. Uptime alerts via email/Slack.
subtasks: Health check endpoint: GET /api/health (all services)
System dashboard page: connection statuses, uptime, metrics
Alert on service down (MT5 disconnect, collector offline)
Uptime monitoring integration (UptimeRobot or similar)
Logging aggregation (structured logs, searchable)

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Rotate Supabase anon key + remove from appsettings.json
tasks.description: appsettings.json:31 ships the Supabase anon JWT in the repo. Rotate the key in the Supabase dashboard, move it to an environment variable / User Secrets, add appsettings.Development.json to .gitignore, and scrub git history if the key has ever been public.
subtasks: Rotate Supabase anon + (if present) service_role keys
Replace hardcoded JWT with env var / User Secrets
Update Program.cs / SupabaseService to read from config at runtime
Rewrite git history if repo was ever public (git-filter-repo)

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Enable RLS on every Supabase table + block raw password reads
tasks.description: All 18 public tables have RLS disabled (advisor lint 0013). account_settings.password + bridge_settings.password are plaintext and readable over PostgREST with the anon key. Enable RLS everywhere with a deny-all default and explicit service_role-only policies for sensitive columns.
subtasks: Enable RLS on all 18 tables
Deny-all policy by default
Move password reads behind a service_role RPC
Re-run mcp__supabase__get_advisors until zero security ERRORs

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] MT5 deal subscription race — snapshot + backfill before OnDealAdd
tasks.description: MT5ManagerConnection.cs:122 subscribes to the deal callback before the position snapshot and backfill, so deals arriving in that window are lost or double-counted. Reorder: GetPositions() → BackfillDeals() → OnDealAdd += handler.
subtasks: Reorder bring-up in MT5ManagerConnection.ExecuteAsync
Add a reconnect-flow integration test that replays deals during the gap
Document the ordering invariant in CLAUDE.md

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] BridgePipResolver.Overrides — thread-safe dictionary
tasks.description: BridgePipResolver.cs:13 holds a plain Dictionary<string, decimal> loaded by PositionManager.LoadMappings and read concurrently from the Bridge worker + controller threads. Torn reads / missing entries possible. Switch to ConcurrentDictionary or swap the reference atomically on reload.
subtasks: Switch Overrides to ConcurrentDictionary<string, decimal>
Reload path uses atomic replace (Interlocked.Exchange on a wrapper ref)
Unit test: concurrent reload + lookup

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Convert MT5 RawTypes financial fields double -> decimal
tasks.description: RawTypes.cs:15-40 declares Price / Profit / Commission / Storage / Fee as double. FX precision loss flows into every downstream P&L. Change to decimal and update MT5ApiReal.CopyDeal + GetPositions conversions.
subtasks: Change RawDeal/RawPosition/RawAccount money fields to decimal
Update MT5ApiReal conversions (native returns double — cast at the edge)
Add a test that exercises tiny/price-sensitive cases (EURUSD 1.08547 × 100000)

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Set search_path on 5 Supabase RPCs
tasks.description: aggregate_bbook_settled_pnl, aggregate_bbook_pnl_full, latest_snapshots_before, bridge_executions_touch_updated_at, bridge_settings_touch_updated_at have mutable search_path (advisor lint 0011). Recreate each with `SET search_path = public, pg_temp` and commit as migration files (currently applied inline only).
subtasks: Rewrite each RPC with SET search_path = public, pg_temp
Create migration files (supabase/migrations/*.sql)
Re-run security advisors until zero WARN

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Authenticate /ws/exposure and /ws/bridge
tasks.description: Program.cs:229 and :264 accept any WebSocket connection on the LAN. Exposure data and hedge gaps are commercially sensitive. Add bearer-token gate on AcceptWebSocketAsync, or bind to 127.0.0.1 behind an authenticated reverse proxy.
subtasks: Decide auth model (bearer / session cookie)
Gate both WS endpoints on AcceptWebSocketAsync
Add dashboard-side token issuance + include in WS upgrade headers

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Remove light theme — dark-only per spec
tasks.description: ThemeContext.tsx exposes LIGHT_THEME and App.tsx includes a toggle. Spec forbids light theme. Delete LIGHT_THEME or pin THEME to DARK_THEME at boot and remove the toggle UI.
subtasks: Remove LIGHT_THEME from theme.ts or mark internal-only
Remove toggle button in App.tsx
Verify localStorage migration (existing 'light' entries ignored)

tasks.title: [HIGH] Add appsettings.Development.json to .gitignore
tasks.description: .gitignore excludes .env but not appsettings.Development.json. Add the line and `git rm --cached` the current tracked (empty) file so no future dev ever commits dev secrets.
subtasks: Add appsettings.Development.json to .gitignore
git rm --cached the file
Document User Secrets usage in README

tasks.title: [HIGH] ConfigureAwait(false) across SupabaseService
tasks.description: SupabaseService has ~100 awaits with no ConfigureAwait(false). Kestrel has no SyncContext today so it's latent, but it becomes a thread-pool landmine the moment anyone hosts in IIS or blocks on async. Sweep the file.
subtasks: Add .ConfigureAwait(false) on every await in library services
Run .NET analyzer CA2007 to enforce

tasks.title: [HIGH] DataSyncService — map CanonicalSymbol before upsert
tasks.description: DataSyncService.cs:135 TODO. CanonicalSymbol = d.Symbol writes raw MT5 names. Any downstream consumer that doesn't re-normalize fragments on 'US30-' vs 'US30'. Resolve via _positionManager.FindMapping before upsert.
subtasks: Call FindMapping('bbook') in DataSyncService before building DealRecord
Fall back to NormalizeKey if mapping missing
Backfill historical canonical_symbol column

tasks.title: [HIGH] Python collector — env-source BACKEND_URL
tasks.description: collector/main.py:14 hardcodes BACKEND_URL = 'http://localhost:5000'. Switch to os.getenv with that as default; document in .env.example.
subtasks: os.getenv('BACKEND_URL', 'http://localhost:5000')
Update .env.example

tasks.title: [HIGH] Python collector — reconnect on MT5 drop
tasks.description: position_loop catches generic Exception and retries the POST forever without reconnecting MT5. Coverage goes silently stale. Catch MT5 errors distinctly, call mt5.shutdown()+initialize() with exponential backoff, expose last_position_update on /health.
subtasks: Distinguish mt5 errors from HTTP errors
Exponential backoff on reconnect (1s → 60s cap)
/health returns last_position_update_utc
Backend alerts if stale > 5s

tasks.title: [HIGH] Batch bridge_executions writes
tasks.description: BridgeSupabaseWriter writes one pair per UPSERT. With the table already at 4.3K rows and growing, Supa REST becomes the bottleneck. Batch VALUES (...), (...), ... up to 500/batch with backpressure.
subtasks: Channel-based queue with bounded capacity
Flush on N pairs OR M ms, whichever first
Drop-oldest under sustained backpressure

tasks.title: [HIGH] BridgePairingEngine — prune stale COV_OUT on ingest
tasks.description: Pairing window is enforced inside the greedy loop; stale COV_OUT rows older than PairingWindowMs linger in _buffer and keep competing for matches. Prune on each publish, or reject on Observe().
subtasks: Prune _buffer entries where (now - observed) > PairingWindowMs
Add test: stale COV_OUT does not match a younger CLIENT
Metric: bufferEvictionCount

tasks.title: [HIGH] Guarantee CanonicalSymbol before Bridge pairing
tasks.description: BridgePairingEngine requires pre-populated CanonicalSymbol. Verify every ingest path (Stub, Rest/FIX) applies mapping BEFORE Publish() and assert non-empty.
subtasks: Add assertion in BridgeExecutionStore.Observe()
Apply mapping in RestCentroidBridgeService ingest
Test: unmapped symbol → loud rejection, not silent pairing miss

tasks.title: [HIGH] React — positions tab polling cadence
tasks.description: App.tsx:61 polls /api/exposure/positions every 1s continuously. Overkill for a view that doesn't need 1 Hz refresh. Switch to 5s or WS-driven.
subtasks: Raise interval to 5s OR source from useExposureSocket
Pause polling when tab is hidden (visibilitychange)

tasks.title: [HIGH] WebSocket hook — log malformed JSON
tasks.description: useExposureSocket.ts:73 swallows JSON parse errors silently. Upstream protocol breaks become invisible. Log with a truncated payload and surface via a hook state.
subtasks: Log parse errors with first 200 chars of payload
Expose lastParseError on the hook return

tasks.title: [HIGH] AccountModal — formatBeirut for all timestamps
tasks.description: web/src/pages/PositionsCompare/RightPanel/AccountModal.tsx:60-62 uses raw .toLocaleString('en-GB'). Regresses the Beirut alignment done elsewhere. Use formatBeirut / formatBeirutDate.
subtasks: Swap toLocaleString calls for formatBeirut helpers
Grep to confirm no other regressions

tasks.title: [HIGH] Surface fetch failures in Exposure/Settings panels
tasks.description: ExposureTable and SettingsPanel have bare `catch {}` on parallel fetches. Partial failure shows stale data with zero warning. Track per-fetch status and render a warning pill.
subtasks: Replace empty catches with per-request error state
Render warning badge near affected cells
Bubble error count into the toolbar

tasks.title: MT5ApiReal — queue tick/deal callbacks off the native thread
tasks.description: FireTick / FireDealAdd invoke handlers synchronously inside native MT5 callbacks. A slow handler (Supa write, disk log) stalls the feed thread. Queue to a bounded Channel<T> drained on a dedicated task.
subtasks: Introduce Channel<Tick> + Channel<Deal>
Native callback does TryWrite only
Document ≤ 1ms handler budget

tasks.title: SupabaseService — centralize PostgREST DateTime UTC normalization
tasks.description: PostgREST timestamptz → DateTime Kind=Local is a recurring bug (already cost us the minute-firing scheduler). Centralize a ReadUtc helper and use everywhere timestamps are parsed.
subtasks: Add ReadUtc(JsonElement) returning Kind=Utc DateTime
Refactor every Supabase DateTime deserialization
Add unit test covering the deserialization

tasks.title: Split fat files: SupabaseService, ExposureController, SettingsPanel, ExposureTable
tasks.description: SupabaseService 1060 LOC, ExposureController 861 LOC, SettingsPanel 1195 LOC, ExposureTable 658 LOC. Split into focused repositories / subcomponents.
subtasks: SupabaseService → DealsRepository / SnapshotsRepository / AccountsRepository / BridgeRepository / ReconciliationRepository
ExposureController → PnLCalculationService
SettingsPanel → AccountsCard / VerifyCard / MovedAccountsTable / SnapshotSchedulesCard / ReconciliationCard (already partially split)
ExposureTable → ExposureToolbar + ExposureRow

tasks.title: Supabase — drop duplicate index + index FK + audit unused
tasks.description: Duplicate idx_deals_deal_time + idx_deals_time (advisor WARN). Unindexed FK alert_events.threshold_id. 18 unused indexes flagged. Audit and prune.
subtasks: Drop duplicate index
CREATE INDEX on alert_events(threshold_id)
Audit 18 unused indexes; drop or document why kept

tasks.title: Supabase — partition / archive deals table
tasks.description: deals has 287K+ rows with no partitioning or archival. Sync jobs and reconciliation scan ever-larger tables. Partition by month on deal_time or archive > 90 days into deals_historical.
subtasks: Decide partition vs archive
Migration + retention policy
Update DataSyncService + ReconciliationService to respect partition pruning

tasks.title: Commit inline-applied Supabase RPCs to migrations
tasks.description: aggregate_bbook_settled_pnl, aggregate_bbook_pnl_full, latest_snapshots_before were applied via MCP with no migration files. A fresh deploy has no RPCs.
subtasks: Write supabase/migrations/20260418_aggregate_rpcs.sql
Include SET search_path = public, pg_temp
Verify mcp__supabase__list_migrations shows them

tasks.title: Python /health — report position_loop liveness
tasks.description: Current /health checks terminal_info only. Doesn't detect a stalled position loop. Track last_position_update_utc and mark unhealthy if > 5s.
subtasks: Thread-safe last_update timestamp
/health returns status='ok'/'stale' with last_update
Backend surfaces stale state in the UI

tasks.title: PositionsGrid — source badge uses theme tokens, not hex
tasks.description: PositionsGrid.tsx:65-66 hardcodes rgba(91,158,255,0.15) + #FF8A80. Replace with THEME.blue / THEME.red + an opacity helper.
subtasks: Replace hex literals with THEME.*
Add alpha() helper in theme.ts if needed

tasks.title: CompareTable — sign prefix on Net P&L total
tasks.description: CompareTable.tsx ~:112 renders the Net P&L total without a +/- prefix. Inconsistent with every other P&L cell.
subtasks: Add sign prefix consistent with fmtPnl

tasks.title: PnLPanel — formatDate uses Beirut weekday, not UTC
tasks.description: PnLPanel.tsx formatDate uses d.getUTCDay() for the weekday — ignores Beirut TZ convention. Rename + route through formatBeirutDate + weekday derivation on a Beirut-normalized date.
subtasks: Use formatBeirutDate + derive weekday from Beirut date
Handle DST transitions correctly

tasks.title: AlertEngine — thread-safe threshold list
tasks.description: AlertEngine._thresholds plain List<T>. Hot-read while admin reloads. Torn reads possible. Interlocked.Exchange on the ref, or ReaderWriterLockSlim.
subtasks: Atomic swap on reload
Test: concurrent reload + evaluation

tasks.title: Delete UnitTest1.cs template leftover
tasks.description: src/CoverageManager.Tests/UnitTest1.cs is an empty placeholder method TestMethod1. Remove.
subtasks: Delete the file + remove from test run

tasks.title: DataSyncService — pagination for large deal ranges
tasks.description: DataSyncService.cs:32 30s tick scans all deals. 280K rows today; will timeout eventually. Paginate or use a bulk-diff RPC.
subtasks: Implement cursor-based pagination OR a bulk diff RPC
Add integration test with a synthetic 1M-row window

tasks.title: Python collector — pin exact dependency versions
tasks.description: requirements.txt uses >= minimum bounds. Pin exact for reproducible prod builds.
subtasks: Pin via uv lock / pip-tools
Add renovate config for routine bumps

tasks.title: useDateRange — migrate to BroadcastChannel API
tasks.description: Current cross-tab sync uses manual StorageEvent dispatch. BroadcastChannel is the modern idiom and avoids the storage-event footgun.
subtasks: Replace StorageEvent with BroadcastChannel('coverage-manager')
Fallback to StorageEvent in old browsers

tasks.title: AlertToast — type-safe audio handler
tasks.description: AlertToast.tsx:49 uses `as any` cast. Define an AudioHandler interface instead.
subtasks: Define AudioHandler interface
Remove any-cast

tasks.title: TotalBar — remove tautological ternary
tasks.description: TotalBar.tsx:60 `color: highlight ? color : color` is a no-op. Clean up.
subtasks: Either add a second color branch or drop the ternary

tasks.title: Program.cs — simplify HttpClient registration
tasks.description: Program.cs:48-53 calls AddHttpClient<T>() then overrides with AddSingleton<T>. Works but confusing; drop the typed client and use IHttpClientFactory.CreateClient(name) explicitly.
subtasks: Use named HttpClient instead of typed
Apply to SupabaseService, BridgeSupabaseWriter, RestCentroidBridgeService, CoverageDealIndex

tasks.title: Add test asserting broker identity: net = -Client + Coverage
tasks.description: Spec's load-bearing P&L identity has no explicit test. Add one in CoverageManager.Tests covering positive/negative/mixed cases.
subtasks: Test case: client wins + coverage wins → broker zero
Test case: client loss + coverage loss → broker neutral
Test case: sign asymmetry

tasks.title: MT5 reconnect backoff — implementation + integration test
tasks.description: Rule says 1s → 60s exponential backoff on MT5 drop. Verify the code does this and add a test that simulates disconnect.
subtasks: Audit MT5ManagerConnection retry logic
Add exponential backoff if missing
Simulated-drop integration test
